water: position: absolute; inset: -30% 55% 40% -30%; background: var(--map-water); border-radius: 40% 60% 50% 50%; transform: rotate(-12deg);
park-1: position: absolute; top: 18%; right: 12%; width: 90px; height: 100px; background: var(--map-park); border-radius: 60% 40% 50% 50%;
park-2: position: absolute; bottom: 25%; left: 12%; width: 70px; height: 60px; background: var(--map-park); border-radius: 50%;
road: position: absolute; background: var(--map-road); border: 1px solid var(--map-road-minor);
building: position: absolute; background: var(--map-building); border: 1px solid #D5CFC0;
hazard-tail: width: 0; height: 0; border-left: 6px solid transparent; border-right: 6px solid transparent;
sl-label: font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); letter-spacing: 0.4px; text-transform: uppercase;
eta-time: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; line-height: 1;
eta-save: margin-left: auto; background: var(--cleared-green); padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 500px; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;
eta-end: padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 500px; background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid var(--police-red); color: var(--police-red); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700;
